name: Moroccan-Spiced Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, bring water to a boil.
2. Add lentils; return to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Heat over Medium-High until hot.
4. Add onions; cook 8-10 minutes or until edges of onions are brown, stirring occasionally.
5. Add onions to lentils. If desired for additional flavor, pour about 1/2 cup of lentil liquid into the skillet and scrape bottom and sides to remove any bits of browned onions.
6. Add to lentil mixture. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
7. Cover and cook an additional 20 minutes.
Makes 4 (1 3/4 cup) servings.
Per serving: 310 calories, 1g fat, 2% Daily Value (DV) protein
